actual_column_names: Total Investments in Fixed Assets from 1978 to 2017 in Shandong Province

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.evidence: Row 3 and Row 4 headers, where Row 3 has "Year" and "Total Investment in Fixed Assets", while Row 4 has sub-labels under those categories.
irregularities.details: The headers are structured in multiple levels, indicating a hierarchy where the first row has broad categories and the second row has sub-categories for different types of investments.

irregularities.label: WIDE_FORMAT
irregularities.evidence: Columns 1 to 6 contain values of the same nature (Total Investment in various sectors) spread across multiple headers.
irregularities.details: The column headers represent detailed breakdowns (e.g., State-owned Units, Individual Economy) of the same variable (Total Investment), indicating a wide format structure as the column headers could be consolidated into a single column without loss of information.

irregularities.label: AGGREGATE_COLUMNS
irregularities.evidence: The data in Row 3 indicates that totals may be aggregating sub-categories from Row 4 and beyond (e.g., Total Investment may aggregate State-owned Economy and others).
irregularities.details: Columns serve as aggregations (like totals) across various categories (state-owned, collective-owned, etc.) hence they function as summary columns for the data in subsequent rows.
